## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Scrunch AI for AI-powered SEO monitoring and insights.](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Scrunch AI offers comprehensive AI search monitoring across multiple platforms (GPT, Claude, Perplexity, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [GrowthX is interested in integrating AI search data into client reporting and exploring deeper partnership opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Scrunch provides API access for partners to integrate data into custom dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in potential co-marketing and thought leadership collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)

## Topics

### Scrunch AI's Offering

  - [Monitoring is viewed as a "commodity" wedge into more valuable capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Tracks presence, position, sentiment, and citations across AI search platforms](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Persona-based approach for generating relevant prompts and analyzing results](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [API access available for partners to integrate data into custom dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Pricing based on volume of prompts/entities monitored, with custom options for partners](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)

### GrowthX's Needs and Interests

  - [Seeking AI search data to integrate into client reporting (potentially via Looker Studio)](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Interested in comprehensive attribution tracking from AI mentions to referral visits](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Looking for a partner to establish thought leadership in AI SEO space](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Exploring options before building in-house solution](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)

### Potential Partnership Structure

  - [API access for GrowthX to integrate Scrunch data into client dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Possible co-marketing opportunities (webinars, whitepapers, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Mutual referral agreement for customer introductions](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Non-exclusive partnership, allowing both to work with other players in the space](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=1863.0)

### Market Landscape and Challenges

  - [Rapidly evolving space with many new entrants in past 4-5 months](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Difficulty in accurately measuring AI search volume and user behavior](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Potential shift in web content creation to prioritize AI crawlers over human readers](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Set up 1-week trial access for GrowthX team to explore Scrunch platform](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call to discuss API integration possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
  - [Explore co-marketing and thought leadership collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Continue discussions on partnership structure and pricing models](https://fathom.video/share/gAsWLWzJRtY76PXHXv4gXGwfEf7gFneb?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
